ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/jetpack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/jetpack
Language: php
Security, performance, marketing, and design tools — Jetpack is made by WordPress experts to make WP sites safer and faster, and help you grow your traffic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/woocommerce-payments
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/woocommerce-payments
Language: php
Securely accept major credit and debit cards, and allow customers to pay you directly without leaving your WooCommerce store. View and manage transactions from one convenient place - your WordPress dashboard.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FOSSBilling/FOSSBilling
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FOSSBilling/FOSSBilling
Language: php
Empower your hosting business with FOSSBilling, the free and open-source solution for efficient billing and client management.

URL: https://github.com/alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
Language: php
Speedtest Tracker is a self-hosted application that monitors the performance and uptime of your internet connection.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: centreon/centreon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/centreon/centreon
Language: php
Centreon is a network, system and application monitoring tool. Centreon is the only AIOps Platform Providing Holistic Visibility to Complex IT Workflows from Cloud to Edge.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.
